title: Dungeon And Village: Botania
description: Adds dungeons to the Botania mod
body:
This modification adds dungeons to the Botania mod. Currently, **2** dungeons have been added.

 
![structures from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29471535acb06c0775486476d5803ab8f0881403.jpeg)
